test_cases.name: health_check_success
test_cases.description: Verify health check endpoint returns 200 with status ok

test_cases.description: Create author with name, bio, and born_year

test_cases.description: Create author without required name field returns validation error

test_cases.description: Create author with name exceeding 100 characters returns validation error

test_cases.description: Retrieve author by ID with ETag header

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Retrieve non-existent author returns 404

test_cases.description: Delete author with no associated books

test_cases.description: Create category with name and optional description

test_cases.name: create_duplicate_category

test_cases.name: create_book_success

test_cases.description: Create book with duplicate ISBN returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.description: Create book with ISBN outside 10-13 character range returns 422

test_cases.name: create_book_nonexistent_author

test_cases.description: List books with default pagination returns paginated response

test_cases.description: List books with search parameter filters by title and ISBN

test_cases.description: List books with min_price and max_price filters

test_cases.name: get_book_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve book by ID with full details and ETag

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Soft delete book sets is_deleted flag

test_cases.description: Restore soft-deleted book clears is_deleted flag

test_cases.description: Restore non-deleted book returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: apply_discount_invalid_percent
test_cases.description: Apply discount with percent outside (0, 50] range returns 422
